multiple-form-16-job-switch.prompt: Clean premium fintech illustration of two Form 16 documents merging into a single rupee tax computation sheet, with a small briefcase signalling a job switch, on a soft teal gradient. Indian context, no heavy text.
multiple-form-16-job-switch.alt: Two Form 16 documents merging into one tax computation after a job switch

switch-tax-regime-at-itr-filing.prompt: Minimal fintech illustration of a person at a fork in the road choosing between two signposts labelled with scales of tax, rupee coins on one side and a deduction folder on the other, calm blue and teal palette. Indian context.
switch-tax-regime-at-itr-filing.alt: Person choosing between old and new tax regime signposts

how-to-read-form-16.prompt: Premium illustration of a Form 16 split into two clean panels, one labelled Part A with a government stamp and one labelled Part B with a salary breakdown, magnifying glass over it, soft teal background. Indian context.
how-to-read-form-16.alt: Form 16 shown as Part A and Part B panels with a magnifying glass
